The '''MD-9 medical droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. The MD-9 model was a prototype medical droid used only in limited sectors, like the [[MD-7 medical droid|MD-7]] and [[MD-8 medical droid|MD-8]] models.
